summary: Migration validation agent deployed to Azure with initial testing and telemetry via Application Insights. Team plans to integrate feedback collection, with Azure Table Storage under evaluation. Incomplete migration reports for large batches observed; root cause analysis assigned. Client demo expected next Friday; timeline may be impacted if reporting issue persists. Team is awaiting the final migration dataset from the infrastructure team. Next meeting on Monday.
actionItems: Nilang: Evaluate options and propose an approach for storing feedback in Azure Table Storage.
Prithbiraj: Analyze logs and identify the root cause of incomplete migration reports for large batches.
Anand: Prepare the client demo presentation and flow for next Friday.
Soham: Coordinate with the infrastructure team to obtain the final migration dataset by end of week.
risks: Unresolved reporting issue may affect readiness and quality of the client demo next Friday.
Delayed delivery of the final migration dataset may slow or block validation testing.
blockers: Awaiting final migration dataset from the infrastructure team to proceed with comprehensive validation testing.
dependencies: Final migration dataset from the infrastructure team (needed by end of week).
